ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cache_levels" (
  "cache_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cache level */,
  "cache_type" TEXT /* Type of cache (e.g., Registers, TLB, L1 cache, L2 cache, Virtual Memory) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cache level */,
  "managed_by" TEXT /* Entity managing the cache level (e.g., Compiler, Hardware, Hardware + OS) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the cache level in bytes */,
  "associativity" TEXT /* Associativity of the cache (e.g., direct-mapped, 2-way set associative, fully associative) */,
  "line_size" INTEGER /* Size of each cache line in bytes */,
  "replacement_policy" TEXT /* Policy used to replace cache lines (e.g., LRU, FIFO, Random) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cache_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cached_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cached data item */,
  "cache_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cache level where the data is cached */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data cached (e.g., 4-8 bytes words, address translations, 64-bytes block, 4-KB page) */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the cached data */,
  "access_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency with which the data is accessed (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "last_access_time" TEXT /* Last time the data was accessed */,
  "access_pattern" TEXT /* Pattern of data access (e.g., sequential, random) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cached_data_cache_id FOREIGN KEY ("cache_id") REFERENCES cache_levels ("cache_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cache_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cache location */,
  "cache_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cache level */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the cache level (e.g., CPU core, On-Chip TLB, On/Off-Chip L2) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cache location */,
  "bus_type" TEXT /* Type of bus connecting the cache to the next level (e.g., AXI, PCI) */,
  "bus_bandwidth" INTEGER /* Bandwidth of the bus in bytes per cycle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cache_locations_cache_id FOREIGN KEY ("cache_id") REFERENCES cache_levels ("cache_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "latencies" (
  "latency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each latency measurement */,
  "cache_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cache level */,
  "latency_cycles" INTEGER /* Latency in cycles */,
  "read_latency" INTEGER /* Latency for read operations in cycles */,
  "write_latency" INTEGER /* Latency for write operations in cycles */,
  "read_bandwidth" INTEGER /* Read bandwidth in bytes per cycle */,
  "write_bandwidth" INTEGER /* Write bandwidth in bytes per cycle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("latency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_latencies_cache_id FOREIGN KEY ("cache_id") REFERENCES cache_levels ("cache_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the simulation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the simulation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* JSON string containing the parameters used for the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation result */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation */,
  "cache_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cache level */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the simulation (e.g., hit rate, miss rate, average latency) */,
  "hit_rate" REAL /* Hit rate of the cache level */,
  "miss_rate" REAL /* Miss rate of the cache level */,
  "average_latency" INTEGER /* Average latency in cycles */,
  "data_throughput" INTEGER /* Data throughput in bytes per cycle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_cache_id FOREIGN KEY ("cache_id") REFERENCES cache_levels ("cache_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Brief description of the researcher's interests */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation run */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date the simulation was run */,
  "run_status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation run (e.g., started, completed, failed) */,
  "run_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the simulation run in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_runs_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_runs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cache_hierarchy" (
  "hierarchy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cache hierarchy entry */,
  "cache_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cache level */,
  "parent_cache_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent cache level */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the cache in the hierarchy (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the cache hierarchy entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hierarchy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cache_hierarchy_parent_cache_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_cache_id") REFERENCES cache_levels ("cache_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cache_hierarchy_cache_id FOREIGN KEY ("cache_id") REFERENCES cache_levels ("cache_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report file */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who generated the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id")
)
